NAME: TOPMed — WGS freeze expansion & multi-omics integration
DESCRIPTION: Continued expansion of TOPMed WGS to over 100k participants across >50 NHLBI cohort studies. Integration of whole-genome sequencing with epigenomics, transcriptomics, proteomics, and metabolomics data. Open access to sequencing data and variant annotations through the BRAVEO browser and dbGaP, serving as a critical resource for the global genetics community.
